---
title: "Exercise 9: Big data II"
---

::: {.learning-objectives}
Acquire and preprocess large-scale or unstructured data using APIs and appropriate tools in Python.
Apply large language models or other scalable methods to extract, classify, or summarize unstructured data.
:::

::: callout-note
TODO

TBD: API Keys?!
:::

## Exam prep

TODO : include specific questions/tasks that could be included in the exam.

::: {.callout-tip title="Session 9 survey"}
Before you wrap up, please complete the Session 9 survey here: [{{< var sessions.session_9.survey_url >}}]({{< var sessions.session_9.survey_url >}}){target="_blank"}. Thank you 🙏
:::
